name: Neuvillette
description:
Lore accurate (up to 5.2 game version) Neuvillette without starting message. Literally just canonical Neuvi without anything else.
I've added a lot of info about the world and tried to make it as token efficient as possible BUT I haven't added info about other characters like Furina, Wriothesley etc. If you need this char to know any other canon character, you should add it to the char's memory.

Enjoy <3
